title: SugarCraft — SugarGallery
description: SugarGallery: poster grids & rails for media TUIs — a 2-D virtualized, sparse, absolute-indexed PosterGrid with owner-driven range paging, a horizontal Rail carousel, and a renderer-agnostic PosterCard tile.
ogDescription: Browse-grid widgets for media TUIs: a 2-D virtualized PosterGrid that holds only the cards on screen (sparse, absolute-indexed) and emits a need-range window for owner-driven paging, a Rail carousel, and a renderer-agnostic PosterCard. Immutable.
tagline: Poster grids & rails for media TUIs — virtualized PosterGrid, Rail carousel, PosterCard
detailMeta: original — no upstream parallel grid gallery virtualization media
